art_market.summary: Korean art market continues to see digital innovation and museum blockbusters in March 2026.
key_events: 20! 2026 Art Seoul launched Mar 16, introducing 80% refund guarantee system.
Major exhibitions: Kim Yun-shin at Hoam Museum, Yoo Young-kuk at SeMA, Damien Hirst at MMCA.
Ongoing March auctions featuring modern and contemporary works.
art_market.outlook: Focus on enhancing trust, accessibility, and transparency remains key.

stock_market.summary: Korean stock market facing high volatility and sharp declines in March 2026 due to geopolitical tensions.

key_indicators.KOSPI: Significant downturns mid-March; volatility persists amid U.S.-Iran conflict risks.
key_indicators.Outlook: Analysts advise caution; Goldman Sachs maintains a long-term target of 7,000 despite near-term headwinds.
